domains.remainingGate: Reconstruct as Tranche A from current main and obtain exact-head browser and accessibility evidence.
Reconstruct as Tranche B and certify deterministic outputs on the integrated commit.
Deploy protected human-review operations and obtain qualified review evidence.
Deploy authenticated identity, managed signing, organization-isolated persistence, and immutable approval retention.
Operate destination, incident, recovery, recall, and acknowledgment drills in the protected environment.
Pass registry and dependency validation on the exact reconstructed integration commit.
Execute and retain immutable evidence for all 44 positive and 44 adversarial paths in the protected authority.
Obtain successful authority, type, unit, build, and browser runs attached to one exact commit.
Merge Tranches A through F from current main and close PR 190 as superseded rather than merged.
Complete private evidence, drafting, qualified review, testing, and exact-version approval.
Complete human accessibility review and output-specific conformance testing.
Complete protected runtime, organization onboarding, contracts, security, clinical governance, implementation, support, and controlled pilot approval.
All pilot, operational, review, security, continuity, support, and release evidence must be complete before production consideration.

openBlockers.condition: No exact-head GitHub Actions certification is attached and Vercel reports an account build-rate limit rather than an application result.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Produce successful exact-commit authority, type, unit, build, and browser evidence.

openBlockers.condition: Draft PR 190 overlaps with the current main lineage and is not an acceptable merge unit.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Reconstruct and merge six bounded tranches from current main.

openBlockers.condition: Identity, managed signing, tenant persistence, audit retention, and recovery are represented by contracts rather than deployed evidence.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Deploy and independently test the protected authority runtime.

openBlockers.condition: Qualified clinical, pharmacy, health-literacy, accessibility, privacy, security, and implementation approval evidence is not present.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Operate the protected review workflow with authenticated human reviewers.

openBlockers.condition: No complete clinical module is represented as released by the public engineering foundation.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Complete the private evidence-to-release lifecycle for each clinical module.

openBlockers.condition: Automated checks do not establish accessible PDF, print, portal, or assistive-technology conformance.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Complete output-specific automated and human accessibility testing.

openBlockers.condition: No real hospital destination has completed authentication, conformance, monitoring, retry, support, and controlled deployment testing.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Validate each concrete destination under an approved organization environment.

openBlockers.condition: Organization onboarding, entitlement, destination, incident, recall, support, and offboarding operations are not deployed.
openBlockers.requiredResolution: Complete organization lifecycle operations and evidence.

allowedPublicClaims: CAF has developed a public-safe governed engineering architecture for structured patient education.
The architecture defines 44 authoritative capabilities and 88 required synthetic conformance paths.
The public repository contains nonclinical synthetic fixtures and explicit privacy and claims boundaries.
PR 190 is a draft architecture source that requires reconstruction and exact-head certification.
completionRule: No readiness domain may be promoted beyond its evidence. Production delivery remains prohibited until all critical blockers are closed with immutable, exact-version evidence.
